themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "So the children of Joseph, Manasseh and Ephraim, took their inheritance —this summary stateme...". Word-study detail reinforces "נַֽחֲלַ֣ת: the inheritance - properly, something inherited, i.e., (abstractly) occupancy, or...".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The allotment to Joseph's sons occurred after the initial conquests described in Joshua 1-12,...".
